mnemonic: success [сэксэ'с] успех, удача - (Секс эс-эсовцев) помогал их успеху и удаче в бою.

examples.eng: He is sure of success.
His plan was a success.
Success waits on effort.
Success is never blamed.
May success wait upon you!
The success repays hard work.
examples.ru: Успех — это вознаграждение за тяжёлый труд.

examples.eng: He is a success in every way.
examples.ru: Ему всё удаётся. / Он успешен во всём.

examples.eng: She is hungry for success.
The experiment is a success.
Success came easily to him.
Education is the door to success.
a key factor in her success
The play was a huge success.
The movie was a great success.
Success is highly probable.
The price of success is hard work.
Her success feeds her vanity.
The movie was a small success.
The show was a raging success.
There is no certainty of success.
The book ensured his success.
He is so envious of her success.
You are such a raving success.
The book was a raging success.
His plan was a runaway success.
I don't grudge him his success.
examples.ru: Я ничего не имею против его успеха.

examples.eng: Success keeps her busy. “Relaxation?" she asks, feigning puzzlement. “What's that?"
examples.ru: Успех не даёт ей сидеть без дела. — Отдых? — с притворным недоумением спрашивает она. — А что это такое?

examples.eng: The film was a runaway success.
He refused to let the setbacks damp his drive for success.
examples.ru: Он не позволил неудачам сдержать его стремление к успеху.

examples.eng: After some modest success, the singer began to snoot the very people who had helped her get her career off the ground.
examples.ru: Добившись кое-каких скромных успехов, певица начала задирать нос перед теми самыми людьми, которые помогли ей как-то сдвинуть её карьеру с мёртвой точки.
